chat.lastSeenUnknown: Macluumaadka ugu dambeeyay lama heli karo

chat.starred: Ku daray kuwa la jecel yahay
chat.signupQuestion: Ma doonaysaa inaad ku biirto MONO?

chat.benefitReuse: ✅ Waxaad mar walba dib u isticmaali kartaa tarjumaadda

contacts.inviteFromContactsDesc: Raadi isticmaalayaasha MONO ee xiriirada taleefankaaga, oo u dir link casuumid kuwa aan isdiiwaangelin.
contacts.idMin2: Fadlan geli ugu yaraan 2 xaraf oo MONO ID ah.

settings.notifRequestCancelled: Codsiga ogolaanshaha ogeysiisyada waa la joojiyay.
settings.dataClearComplete: Xogta maxalliga ah waa la nadiifiyay.
settings.dataClearConfirm:
Ma tirtiri doontaa dhammaan xogta maxalliga ah?
(Dejinta, diiwaanka sheekaysiga, iwm. waa la nadiifin doonaa)
settings.monoIdTaken: MONO ID ayaa hore loo isticmaalay.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm:
Ma hubtaa inaad tirtirto akoonkaaga?
Dhammaan xogta waa la tirtiri doonaa oo lama soo celin karo.
settings.deleteAccountFinal: Xaqiijinta ugu dambeysa: Ma hubtaa inaad tirtirto akoonkaaga?

guestJoin.subtitle: AI Messenger Tarjumaan Waqtiga Dhabta ah
guestJoin.selectLanguage: Fadlan dooro luuqadda aad isticmaali doonto
guestJoin.noInstall: Tarjumaan ayaa bilaaban doona iyada oo aan la rakibin app
guestJoin.linkInfo: Markaad gasho link, waxaad si toos ah ugu wareegi doontaa shaashadda tarjumaadda

installBanner.desc: Ku darida shaashadda guriga waxay ka dhigaysaa mid fudud in la isticmaalo.

inAppBlocker.title: Fadlan ka fur browser-ka dibadda
inAppBlocker.body1: Browser-kan hadda, xidhiidhka wicitaanka/tarjumaadda ayaa inta badan go'aya.
inAppBlocker.body2: Fadlan riix badhanka hoose si aad ugu furto Safari ama Chrome.
inAppBlocker.hint: Ka fur browser-ka kale adigoo riixaya ··· ee kore ee midig ee KakaoTalk

global.title: Caalami
global.needLogin: Waxaad u baahan tahay inaad gasho.
global.timeout: Dib u dhac jawaab: Fadlan hubi xaaladda shabakadda oo isku day mar kale.
global.joinFail: Diyaarinta kanaalka caalamiga ah waa guuldareystay
global.joinedMoving: Kanaalka waa la galay. U wareegaya...
global.createSoon: UI sameynta qolka waxaa lagu xidhi doonaa marxaladda xigta.
global.noPublicRooms: Qolal sheekaysi oo dadweyne ma jiraan

csChat.title: Kaaliyaha MONO
csChat.usage: Waxaan rabaa inaan ogaado sida loo isticmaalo
csChat.fallback: Su'aashan waxaan u gudbin doonaa shaqaalaha. Fadlan nagala soo xidhiidh email (support@lingora.chat) si aan si degdeg ah kuugu caawinno.

onboarding.slide1Title: Xitaa haddii luuqadaha kala duwan yihiin, waa la wada hadli karaa
onboarding.slide1Body: Isku day inaad si dabiici ah u wada hadasho adigoo adeegsanaya tarjumaadda waqtiga dhabta ah.
onboarding.slide2Title: Ku dar saaxiibo oo bilow sheekaysiga
onboarding.slide2Body: Si degdeg ah u hel saaxiibo adigoo adeegsanaya raadinta MONO ID.
onboarding.slide3Title: Tarjumaan degdeg ah oo leh hal QR code
onboarding.slide3Body: Fur QR-ka tabka tarjumaadda oo bilow sheekaysiga.

login.subtitle: AI Messenger Tarjumaan Waqtiga Dhabta ah
login.termsAgree: Markaad gasho, waxaad ogolaatay shuruudaha adeegga iyo siyaasadda khaaska ah
login.termsAgreePatientJoin: Ad isticmaasho adeegga turjumaada ee {{hospitalName}}, waxaad ogolaatay <1>Xeerarka Adeegga</1> iyo <2>Siyaasadda Asturnaanta</2>.
login.termsAgreePatientJoinFallback: Ad isticmaasho adeegga turjumaada, waxaad ogolaatay <1>Xeerarka Adeegga</1> iyo <2>Siyaasadda Asturnaanta</2>.
login.termsAgreeRegister: Markaad iska diiwaangeliso, waxaad ogolaatayaa Xeerarka Adeegga iyo Siyaasadda Asturnaanta.
login.instantQR: Tarjumaan degdeg ah oo leh QR code
login.personalDesc: Messenger-ka caadiga ah ee MONO iyo tarjumaadda
